author: michaelhwang
summary: XSA-all + FullGPTQ int6 + Parallel Muon with improved hyperparameters: MUON_BACKEND_STEPS=10, GPTQ_CALIB_BATCHES=512, LATE_QAT_THRESHOLD=0.20, VE_LAYERS=7,8,9,10
notes: All changes are env var overrides; architecture identical to SOTA. Targets the 700KB unused capacity observed in seed7 (15.20MB actual vs 15.9MB target). Requires H100+FA3 to evaluate.
